title: How to plan for early retirement in your 40s
author: SavingsClub Research Team
excerpt: Imagine waking up on a Tuesday at 9 a.m. With nowhere to be. No commute, no boss, no performance review. For millions of Americans, that's the dream.

title: How to pay off student loan debt faster
author: SavingsClub Research Team
excerpt: Imagine paying $350 every month for ten years and still owing nearly what you started with. That's the reality for millions of Americans carrying student loan debt at mid-to-high interest rates.

title: How to set financial goals you will actually achieve
author: SavingsClub Research Team
excerpt: Your financial goals are sitting in a notes app on your phone, collecting digital dust. Maybe it's "save more money" from January 2024, or "pay off debt" from two years ago.

title: How to create a debt payoff plan that works
author: SavingsClub Research Team
excerpt: Sarah stared at her kitchen table covered in credit card statements, student loan papers, and a car payment notice. The total? $47,000 in debt across seven different accounts.
